title: echinopsis chiloensis subsp. litoralis
intro: Echinopsis chiloensis subsp. litoralis, also known as the coastal pitaya or coastal Christmas cactus, is a species of cactus native to the coastal areas of Chile. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinopsis chiloensis subsp. litoralis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
